title: wolfhsm: API polish — idiomatic Rust shape
description: The wolfhsm crate wraps the wolfHSM C client API but has several patterns that would surprise a RustCrypto user or cause real bugs. This epic tracks the full cleanup needed to make the crate safe and ergonomic. Issues in priority order: (P1) key cache slot leaks on error paths; (P1) RsaKey pub bits field unsound; (P1) raw RSA without padding scheme; (P2) &mut Client passed to every key op; (P2) sha256 free function vs Client methods inconsistency; (P2) no RustCrypto trait implementations; (P3) NvmMetadata label helpers.
